summary.text: The dominant pattern today is the continued acceleration of AI workflow automation, led by MoneyPrinterTurbo's massive 3,965-star daily gain. This project, which generates complete short videos from a single topic, has been hot for multiple days, indicating sustained developer interest beyond a one-day spike. Meanwhile, the Coding Agent category remains active with EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin and voideditor/void both showing steady growth, though no breakout acceleration. The sudden breakout of DeepSpeed (4.8x acceleration) and voideditor (4.5x) suggests renewed attention on inference optimization and open-source AI coding tools, respectively. On Hacker News, Claude Opus 4.8 and a debate on AI's impact on frontend development dominate discussion, hinting at developer anxiety around AI commoditization. The cross-source signal from a Chinese article on Claude Code configuration and a Show HN for Tiny-vLLM (C/CUDA inference engine) reinforces interest in both agent customization and efficient local inference. Looking forward, the convergence of video automation, agent workflow plugins, and local inference optimization may indicate a shift toward production-ready, resource-efficient AI tooling.

projects.name: compound-engineering-plugin
projects.description: Official Compound Engineering plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more

llmSummary.oneLiner: A plugin suite for AI coding agents that enforces a structured 'plan-review-compound' workflow to reduce technical debt and compound engineering knowledge.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding agents often produce inconsistent, low-quality code and fail to learn from past work, leading to accumulating technical debt. This plugin provides a disciplined workflow (brainstorm, plan, review, compound) that forces agents to plan before coding, review after, and document learnings so each unit of work makes the next easier.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 18,275 stars and a 24-hour delta of +449, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The project has a recent release and commits within 7 days, showing active maintenance. The combination of high star count, consistent daily growth, and broad platform support (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, and more) makes it a standout in the AI coding agent ecosystem.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The README has been recently updated with expanded installation instructions for multiple platforms (Codex, Copilot, Factory Droid, Qwen Code, OpenCode, Pi, Gemini, Kiro), which may have broadened its appeal. The project also has a recent release (within 30 days) and active commits, suggesting ongoing feature development.
llmSummary.whyTrending: The plugin addresses a critical pain point for developers using AI coding agents: inconsistent output and lack of knowledge reuse. By providing a structured workflow that compounds learning, it promises to make AI-assisted development more reliable and efficient. The broad platform support and clear documentation lower the barrier to adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This plugin is a practical implementation of 'compound engineering' — a methodology that prioritizes planning and review over raw code generation. Developers using AI coding agents should evaluate whether this workflow improves their code quality and reduces rework. The plugin's multi-platform support makes it easy to try across different tools.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The rise of structured AI coding workflows signals a shift from 'generate and pray' to 'plan, execute, review, and learn.' This plugin is an early example of a pattern that may become standard: AI agents that not only write code but also maintain a knowledge base of past decisions and outcomes. Developers building AI coding tools should consider integrating similar 'compound' mechanisms.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and teams using AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, etc.) who want to improve code quality, reduce technical debt, and systematically capture engineering knowledge.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The plugin enforces a specific workflow that may feel overly ceremonial for small or fast-moving projects. It requires buy-in from the entire team to be effective. The project is tied to the EveryInc ecosystem, which may limit long-term independence. The 80 open issues suggest active development but also potential stability concerns.

projects.name: DeepSpeed
projects.description: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective.

llmSummary.oneLiner: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library for distributed training and inference, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models.
llmSummary.problemSolved: DeepSpeed solves the challenge of training and deploying large-scale deep learning models (billions to trillions of parameters) by providing memory and compute optimizations like ZeRO, pipeline parallelism, and MoE, making distributed training accessible and efficient.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 42,407 stars and a high acceleration ratio of 4.8, DeepSpeed shows sustained attention. The 24-hour star delta of 8 and 7-day average of 1.8 indicate steady growth, not a sudden spike. The project is a foundational tool for large-scale AI, and recent releases (e.g., Muon Optimizer, SDMA) keep it relevant.
llmSummary.whatChanged: Recent commits and releases within 30 days, including support for Muon Optimizer and System DMA for ZeRO-3 on AMD GPUs, plus a best paper award at ASPLOS 2026 for SuperOffload. These updates maintain momentum.
llmSummary.whyTrending: DeepSpeed is essential for training large models like MT-530B and BLOOM, and its continuous innovation (ZeRO, MoE, DeepCompile) attracts developers working on cutting-edge AI.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: DeepSpeed is a must-know for anyone training or deploying large PyTorch models. Its optimizations can reduce memory and compute costs significantly, and it integrates with Hugging Face, Lightning, and other frameworks.
llmSummary.developerInsight: For AI developers, DeepSpeed signals a shift toward efficient large-scale training without sacrificing ease of use. Its support for multiple hardware backends (NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, Huawei) makes it a versatile choice.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Machine learning engineers and researchers training large language models, MoE models, or any deep learning model that requires distributed training or inference optimization.
llmSummary.riskNotes: DeepSpeed is complex and may have a steep learning curve for beginners. It is tightly coupled with PyTorch, so users of other frameworks may not benefit. Some features are experimental.

projects.name: DeepSeek-Reasonix
projects.description: DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent CLI engineered for prefix-cache stability, achieving 99.82% cache hit rates and massive cost savings.
llmSummary.problemSolved: High token costs and cache instability in long-running AI coding sessions, especially with DeepSeek models. Reasonix optimizes the entire loop around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix-cache mechanic, making long sessions affordable.
llmSummary.whyNow: The project is on a sustained hot streak with 14,171 stars, a 24-hour delta of 1,176, and a 7-day average of 1,427 stars per day. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 indicates steady, high-velocity growth without sudden spikes. It ranks top 2 in Agents and top 3 in CLI by velocity on OOSMetrics, signaling strong community adoption.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The sustained high star velocity over the past week, combined with a recent release (within 30 days) and active commits, suggests ongoing improvements and word-of-mouth from users experiencing dramatic cost savings.
llmSummary.whyTrending: Reasonix delivers a tangible, measurable benefit: 99.82% cache hit rate, reducing token costs by ~80% compared to uncached DeepSeek usage. This economic advantage, combined with a polished CLI and desktop client, resonates with developers seeking affordable AI coding assistants.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Reasonix demonstrates that deep optimization for a specific model's caching behavior can yield order-of-magnitude cost improvements. Developers building AI tools should consider model-specific optimizations rather than generic agent frameworks.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift toward model-native agent design, where the agent loop is tightly coupled to the model's infrastructure (e.g., prefix caching). This approach can create moats and cost advantages that generic agents cannot match.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers using DeepSeek models for coding assistance, especially those running long sessions or high-volume workloads who want to minimize API costs.
llmSummary.riskNotes: DeepSeek-only dependency is a double-edged sword: if DeepSeek changes its caching behavior or pricing, Reasonix's advantage may erode. The project has 379 open issues, which may indicate growing pains or feature requests outpacing development.

items.title: 阿里云与Qwen成为UEFA多年全球AI合作伙伴
items.description: 阿里云和Qwen成为UEFA官方独家AI、云计算与电子商务合作伙伴，合作期覆盖2027/2028赛季至2032/2033赛季的UEFA男子俱乐部赛事，以及UEFA EURO 2028。阿里巴巴集团主席蔡崇信表示，将投入云计算、全栈AI及全球电商平台能力，支持赛事运营。合作将利用Qwen大语言模型部署先进AI技术，增强球迷互动与媒体内容体验，并依托阿里云基础设施打造全球沉浸式观赛体验。

items.description: claude-design-card 是一款专为中文内容创作者设计的 Skill。它能将文字、URL 或文章直接转化为可发布的视觉卡片，如公众号首图、小红书图文卡、教程步骤卡等，支持 28 种布局与 10 种主题。其核心价值在于自动化了"写完文章"后最繁琐的流程：自动提炼重点、选择版式、生成 HTML 并截图成 PNG，替代了以往手动使用 Figma 或 Canva 等工具的步骤。该工具开源，适合经常撰写相关内容的创作者尝试。

items.title: 这个 skill 看着不错，可将文字、URL 或文章直接生成公众号首图、小红书图文卡、教程步骤卡等视觉物料，支持 28 种布局和 10 种主题。
items.summary: claude-design-card 是一款专为中文内容创作者设计的 Skill。它能将文字、URL 或文章直接转化为可发布的视觉卡片，如公众号首图、小红书图文卡、教程步骤卡等，支持 28 种布局与 10 种主题。其核心价值在于自动化了"写完文章"后最繁琐的流程：自动提炼重点、选择版式、生成 HTML 并截图成 PNG，替代了以往手动使用 Figma 或 Canva 等工具的步骤。该工具开源，适合经常撰写相关内容的创作者尝试。

items.title: LlamaIndex 团队基于 Google Agents API 构建 LlamaParse/LiteParse 智能体模板
items.summary: LlamaIndex 团队基于 Google 新发布的 Agents API 构建了一个模板，使智能体能够访问 LlamaParse 和 LiteParse，从而自动处理非结构化文档。其工作流程为：配置数据与输出的 Git 仓库，将仓库克隆至智能体沙箱，安装 LiteParse CLI 与 LlamaParse SDK 及相关技能，最后通过提示词驱动智能体自主执行任务。该模板最终形成一个可直接使用 LlamaParse 和 LiteParse 处理真实世界文档的智能体。

trendEntities.title: 亲测为实：难以置信的推理速度
normalizedKeys: title:亲测为实 难以置信的推理速度

items.title: 亲测为实：难以置信的推理速度
items.summary: Kog团队在标准数据中心GPU上实现了极高的单用户推理速度，在8× AMD MI300X GPUs上达到3，000 tokens/s，在8× NVIDIA H200上达到2，100 tokens/s。相比常规推理速度（约100-300 tokens/s），实现了10-30倍提升。其核心思路是将LLM解码视为内存流问题，通过协同设计monokernel、重建同步机制、针对性内存访问映射及采用延迟张量并行的Laneformer模型架构，消除了传统流程的阻塞点。

items.title: 小米开源可控视频音效生成模型 ControlFoley，让声音"按你想要的来"
items.summary: 小米大模型应用团队发布开源可控视频音效生成模型 ControlFoley，旨在解决创作中的可控性难题。该模型统一支持文本引导视频配音、文本控制视频配音和参考音频控制视频配音三类任务。ControlFoley 在 VGGSound-Test 等多个 benchmark 上取得开源 SOTA 表现，其代码、模型权重和在线 Demo 均已开放。

items.title: 亲测为实：难以置信的推理速度
items.summary: Kog团队在标准数据中心GPU上实现了极高的单用户推理速度，在8× AMD MI300X GPUs上达到3，000 tokens/s，在8× NVIDIA H200上达到2，100 tokens/s。相比常规推理速度（约100-300 tokens/s），实现了10-30倍提升。其核心思路是将LLM解码视为内存流问题，通过协同设计monokernel、重建同步机制、针对性内存访问映射及采用延迟张量并行的Laneformer模型架构，消除了传统流程的阻塞点。

items.title: OpenAI推出实时翻译模型，支持70+语言输入
items.summary: OpenAI 实时翻译功能--使用70多种输入语言说话，翻译成13种输出语言： gpt-realtime-translate 接收任意语言的语音输入，并输出目标语言的语音。 大语言模型很棒，但特定用例需要专用模型。 我们正在智能眼镜上运行此功能。
